title: Neomolina darwinii
taxonomy: Neomolina darwinii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Andes mountains in South America. Within the family Rubiaceae, Neomolina darwinii is placed in the subfamily Cinchonoideae. The genus Neomolina is a part of the tribe Cinchoneae, which contains several species of flowering plants. The exact classification of Neomolina darwinii may be subject to change based on ongoing research.
